title: CoreBox
description: A basic PvP Mod that shows the nearest HitPoint in other players.
body:
CoreBox - Minecraft PvP Hitpoint Indicator
Master precision combat with CoreBox!

CoreBox is an advanced Minecraft PvP mode that visually highlights the closest hittable points on enemy players. Small, precise "hitbox" cubes dynamically indicate exactly where to strike next, giving you an edge in accuracy and reaction time during intense battles. Dominate your opponents by pinpointing optimal hit locations at a glance!

Enhance your combat efficiency—CoreBox your way to victory!
